languages.text: "Запрос: прекратить саботаж операции! По протоколу аугмент должен быть удален с неэффективной жизнеформы!" {n}{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Техножрец{/g} пытается добраться до больного, но старик неожиданно прытко уходит от преследования.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Запрос: прекратить саботаж операции! По протоколу аугмент должен быть удален с неэффективной жизнеформы!" {n}{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Техножрец{/g} пытается добраться до больного, но старик неожиданно прытко уходит от преследования.{/n}
traits.speaker: Augmentator

languages.text: "Request: cease the attempted sabotage of the operation! Protocol stipulates that augments must be removed from ineffective life forms!" {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} tries to reach the patient, but the old man evades his grasp with unexpected spryness.{/n}

languages.text: 「要求：作戦の妨害を中止せよ！規定では、効果のない部隊から増援は引き上げられる」{n}テクプリストは患者に近づこうとするが、老人は予想外の機敏さで彼の手をかわす{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request: cease the attempted sabotage of the operation! Protocol stipulates that augments must be removed from ineffective units!" {n}The Tech-Priest tries to reach the patient, but the old man evades his grasp with unexpected spryness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「要求：作戦の妨害を中止せよ！規定では、効果のない部隊から増援は引き上げられる」{n}テクプリストは患者に近づこうとするが、老人は予想外の機敏さで彼の手をかわす{/n}

languages.text: "Talep: Operasyonun sabote edilmesi girişimini durdurun! Protokol, ogmentlerin verimsiz yaşam formlarından çıkarılmasını şart koşuyor!" {n}{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip{/g}, hastaya ulaşmaya çalışıyor. Yaşlı adam ise beklenmedik bir çeviklikle onun elinden kurtuluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request: cease the attempted sabotage of the operation! Protocol stipulates that augments must be removed from ineffective life forms!" {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} tries to reach the patient, but the old man evades his grasp with unexpected spryness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Talep: Operasyonun sabote edilmesi girişimini durdurun! Protokol, ogmentlerin verimsiz yaşam formlarından çıkarılmasını şart koşuyor!" {n}{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip{/g}, hastaya ulaşmaya çalışıyor. Yaşlı adam ise beklenmedik bir çeviklikle onun elinden kurtuluyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Solicitud: ¡cese este intento de sabotaje de la operación! ¡El protocolo estipula que han de retirarse los aumentos de las formas de vida inefectivas!». {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} intenta alcanzar al paciente, pero el anciano esquiva su agarre con una agilidad sorprendente.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request: cease the attempted sabotage of the operation! Protocol stipulates that augments must be removed from ineffective life forms!" {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} tries to reach the patient, but the old man evades his grasp with unexpected spryness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Solicitud: ¡cese este intento de sabotaje de la operación! ¡El protocolo estipula que han de retirarse los aumentos de las formas de vida inefectivas!». {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} intenta alcanzar al paciente, pero el anciano esquiva su agarre con una agilidad sorprendente.{/n}

languages.text: “要求：停止阻碍手术的行为！协议规定，低效率生命体身上的植入物必须移除！”{n}{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}试图抓住他的病人，可那老人却出乎意料地敏捷，躲开了抓捕。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request: cease the attempted sabotage of the operation! Protocol stipulates that augments must be removed from ineffective life forms!" {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} tries to reach the patient, but the old man evades his grasp with unexpected spryness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “要求：停止阻碍手术的行为！协议规定，低效率生命体身上的植入物必须移除！”{n}{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}试图抓住他的病人，可那老人却出乎意料地敏捷，躲开了抓捕。{/n}

languages.text: « Demande : cesser d'essayer de saboter l'opération ! Conformément au protocole, les augmentations des entités inefficaces doivent leur être retirées ! » {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} tente de se saisir du patient, mais le vieil homme lui échappe avec une agilité surprenante.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request: cease the attempted sabotage of the operation! Protocol stipulates that augments must be removed from ineffective life forms!" {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} tries to reach the patient, but the old man evades his grasp with unexpected spryness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Demande : cesser d'essayer de saboter l'opération ! Conformément au protocole, les augmentations des entités inefficaces doivent leur être retirées ! » {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} tente de se saisir du patient, mais le vieil homme lui échappe avec une agilité surprenante.{/n}

languages.text: "Anfrage: Stellt die versuchte Sabotage der Operation ein! Laut Protokoll müssen Augmentationen von ineffektiven Lebensformen entfernt werden!" {n}Der {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriester{/g} greift nach dem Patienten, aber der alte Mann weicht ihm mit unerwarteter Behändigkeit aus.{/n}
